closes #1927·#1931·#1932·#1933·#1935·#1938 · orchestkit

One bundled PR documenting 6 Claude Code features across 8 skills. Click any ✓ cell to see the guidance that skill now carries. Long-session, background-session, and model-selection behavior — surfaced where it matters.

to inspect the per-skill guidance

Self-contained — no network. Mirrors the SKILL.md additions in this PR. Floor is now CC 2.1.148 (#1945), so these no longer need version guards.
